visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair wearing a light purple coat is seen inside a Costco warehouse. She reaches into a glass freezer case and pulls out a red box of sesame rice balls. The warehouse is brightly lit with rows of industrial shelves visible in the background. (2) The woman stands in the aisle, holding the red box of 'Red Bean Kitchen' Sesame Nut Sticky Rice Balls towards the camera. She smiles while pointing at the product information on the packaging. The environment shows other shoppers and stacked products in the distance. (3) The scene shifts to an indoor living room where the woman is sitting at a table next to another woman wearing a black beret and a white sweater. They are presenting the cooked rice balls. The woman in the beret holds a spoon with a grey rice ball that has been opened to show a thick, dark sesame filling. The background features a couch and domestic decor under warm lighting.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 誰要吃湯圓. (2) [Variety]: 我要吃湯圓. [Slogan]: 芝麻堅果湯圓 一顆13.4元. (3) [Variety]: 這個外形看起來很好吃. [Slogan]: 一盒209元. (4) [Variety]: 會流餡哦. [Slogan]: 史上最貴芝麻堅果湯圓. (5) [Slogan]: 試試看. (6) [Slogan]: 紅豆食府 芝麻堅果湯圓 269元. (7) [Subtitle]: 裡面20顆. [Slogan]: 一顆湯圓是13.45元. (8) [Variety]: 滿滿的芝麻香!!. (9) [Variety]: 濃郁的芝麻糊. (10) [Slogan]: 建議直接單吃. (11) [Variety]: 就很美味.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators appearing throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long dark hair and wears a light purple coat; the other woman wears a black beret and a white knit sweater.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The first half is a Costco warehouse with industrial shelving and glass freezer doors. The second half is a domestic living room with a sofa and indoor furniture.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched female voice starts the video with an excited, fast-paced greeting. Background music consists of a bright, high-tempo electronic pop track with a strong 128 BPM beat. A distinct mechanical click is heard as a freezer door is opened. (2) The narration continues with high pitch variability, emphasizing the price and appearance of the product. The music provides a continuous energetic backdrop. Soft rustling of plastic wrapping is heard as the box is manipulated. (3) A second female voice joins the conversation in a domestic setting. The interaction between the two voices is lively and high-arousal. A faint metallic clink of a spoon against a ceramic bowl is audible as they begin tasting. Short 'whoosh' sound effects are used between scene transitions.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To review and recommend the 'Red Bean Kitchen' Sesame Nut Sticky Rice Balls found at Costco, highlighting their high price but exceptional taste and filling quality.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creators explicitly name the brand and display the product packaging throughout the video as the main subject of review.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical social media editing styles with frequent text overlays and high-energy audio to engage viewers interested in food trends.
